name: Curried Oysters with Banana Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 Red Ripe Bananas; Cut into 1/4-inch Dice
1/2 c Red Bell Pepper; Cut into 1/4-inch Dice
recipeInstructions:
1. For the Fish Fumet: Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan and bring to a boil. Lower heat and simmer for 40 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit for another 30 minutes. Strain and reserve the liquid.
2. Prepare the Banana Salsa by mixing all ingredients together until well blended.
3. In a very heavy skillet, sauté the curry powder in butter until fragrant. Stir in shallots and garlic, then add the fish fumet. Reduce mixture until about 1/4 cup remains. Whisk in cream and continue reducing until slightly thick. Add lime juice and salt.
4. Broil or grill oysters over pecan or mesquite until they open. Remove top shell, pour curry sauce over them, and top with banana salsa.
5. Serve immediately.
